name: Large Twisted Seagrass Storage Basket - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Artisanal, Farmhouse Style, Organizing Bin
description:
Add a natural touch to your home office or workspace by organizing with this Twisted Seagrass Storage Bin from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Crafted from seagrass in a round shape, this storage bin features a beautifully twisted design for artisanal flair. The bottom makes it suitable for flat surfaces while the built-in handles offer easy movement from one place to another. In a beige color, this round storage bin offers easy integration into a variety of spaces and provide ample storage for your office supplies and stationery.

Celebrate the everyday with Hearth & Hand — created exclusively for Target in collaboration with Magnolia, a home and lifestyle brand by Chip & Joanna Gaines. Built upon our shared commitment to giving back to our communities, these pieces reveal the beauty of everyday moments shared with family and friends.
